final:
module top_module(
    input IN1,
    input IN2,
    output reg Diff,
    output reg B
    );always @(IN1 or IN2)
        begin
            Diff = IN1^ IN2;
            B = ~IN1 & IN2;
        end
    
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      Diff = IN2 ^ IN1; B = IN1 & ~IN2;
    end
  end

endmodule
